title: Add Multiselect Option in Gantt View
excerpt: The ability to select and move multiple tasks at once in the Gantt View would save significant time for project managers and teams, especially for large projects. Currently, tasks must be adjusted individually, which can…

posts.author: chiselsplay (chiselsplay)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to select and move multiple tasks at once in the Gantt View would save significant time for project managers and teams, especially for large projects. Currently, tasks must be adjusted individually, which can be inefficient. A Multiselect feature would streamline timeline updates, making it easier to adjust multiple tasks simultaneously and enhance project management efficiency. If you frequently use the Gantt View and believe this feature would improve your workflow, please vote and share your thoughts!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Haven’t thought of this before
